name: PT Asuransi Jasa Tania Tbk
summary: PT Asuransi Jasa Tania Tbk provides general insurance products and services in Indonesia. It offers property, motor vehicle, marine cargo and hull, aviation hull, engineering, liability, personal and general accident, bond, and miscellaneous insurance products. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Asuransi Jasa Tania Tbk is a subsidiary of Dana Pensiun Perkebunan.
